name: Voyager Technologies

overview.value: Voyager Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: VOYG) is a defense and space technology company committed to advancing and delivering transformative, mission-critical solutions, protecting critical assets from ground to space. Its Starlab Space Stations segment is a Voyager-led, majority-owned joint venture focused on developing the commercial replacement for the International Space Station.

focus.value: Defense and space technology; Starlab commercial space station joint venture

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add. founded 2019 sourced from the Dylan Taylor bio page on Wikipedia with an adjacent citation-needed flag; consider dropping founded rather than trusting it.
